headline: Coinbase CLO Exits July 31 Amid Crypto Turmoil

article.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
article.summary: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.

headline: Bitdeer Surges 14% on US Mining Expansion

article.title: Bitdeer stock jumps 14% as company expands US mining hardware production
article.summary: Bitdeer shares rallied after the company announced a $36 million Nevada manufacturing facility that will produce its SEALMINER Bitcoin mining machines and expand its hardware business.

headline: SK Hynix Raises $26.5B in Record US IPO

article.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Top US Debut by a Foreign Firm
article.summary: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, as the South Korean memory chipmaker powered through volatility to deliver the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company.

headline: Asia Stocks Rise 1% on US Chip Gain

article.title: Asian Stocks Set to Gain After US Chipmakers Rally: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Asian stocks looked poised to gain on Friday after a resurgence in giant chipmakers drove a rebound on Wall Street. Oil opened lower in early Friday trading.

headline: $1B Crypto Risk: AI Botnet Threat Looms Large

article.title: AI Agents Could Be Turned Into Botnets Through Hallucinations, Researchers Warn
article.summary: Researchers warn AI agents could be tricked into downloading malicious code by exploiting the same hallucinations that cause chatbots to make mistakes.

headline: AVAX Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance Post 1:50 Split

article.title: Avalanche Treasury Firm AVAX One Reclaims Nasdaq Compliance After Reverse Stock Split
article.summary: AVAX One, which stockpiles the native token of the Avalanche crypto network, is back in Nasdaq's good graces after a reverse stock split.

article.title: Bitwise says bitcoin’s ‘floor is rising’ despite AI boom and regulatory delays
article.summary: Bitwise says institutions are buying the bitcoin bear market dip, while many larger investors are still awaiting regulatory clarity.

article.title: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal steps down, remains in advisory role
article.summary: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal joined the firm in mid-2020 to lead its legal, compliance and government relations operations.

article.summary: US central bank chair chooses business and academic leaders to head five new task forces

headline: $1 Trillion AI Growth Hit by Legacy Tech
